title: Faktoriyel Hesaplama
subtitle: Recursive ve iteratif faktoriyel.
code:
<?php

function factorialRecursive(int $n): int {
    if ($n <= 1) return 1;
    return $n * factorialRecursive($n - 1);
}

function factorialIterative(int $n): int {
    $result = 1;
    for ($i = 2; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        $result *= $i;
    }
    return $result;
}

echo "Faktoriyel tablosu (0-10):\n";
for ($i = 0; $i <= 10; $i++) {
    echo $i . "! = " . factorialIterative($i) . "\n";
}

echo "\nRecursive 5! = " . factorialRecursive(5) . "\n";
echo "Iteratif 5! = " . factorialIterative(5) . "\n";

// Kombinasyon hesaplama: C(n,r) = n! / (r! * (n-r)!)
$n = 5;
$r = 2;
$combination = factorialIterative($n) / (factorialIterative($r) * factorialIterative($n - $r));
echo "\nC(" . $n . "," . $r . ") = " . $combination . "\n";

?>
